summary: Iteration 68 - Print Button Fixes Verification. All code verification tests PASSED. Print buttons now exist on ALL tabs in CaseDetail (documents, timeline, grounds, notes, reports, legal, progress) with dynamic data-testid='print-{tabname}-btn'. iOS Safari fix implemented in all three files (CaseDetail, ReportView, BarristerView) using /iPad|iPhone|iPod/ detection. Section filtering threshold increased to 80 chars. Stricter sentence regex implemented. Frontend compiles successfully.

issues: Console warnings about Missing Description for DialogContent - minor accessibility issue

context_for_next_testing_agent: Print button P0 fix verified via code review. All 7 tabs in CaseDetail have print buttons with dynamic data-testid. iOS Safari fix implemented in all three files (CaseDetail uses iframe approach, ReportView/BarristerView redirect to PDF export). Section filtering threshold is 80 chars. Stricter sentence regex prevents wrong info extraction. App uses Emergent Google Auth which requires manual testing for full UI verification.
